name: Invoice OCG Review
description: Audit outside counsel invoice against the client's OCG. Flags block billing, rate violations, vague descriptions, and unauthorised tasks. Generates a dispute letter. Replaces BillBlast / TyMetrix / Apperio.
taskDescriptionTemplate: Review the attached outside-counsel invoice from {{lawFirm}} for matter {{matterNumber}} against {{client}}'s Outside Counsel Guidelines. Identify all violations, quantify the suggested reduction, and draft a dispute letter if required.
promptTemplate: Review the attached outside-counsel invoice from {{lawFirm}} for matter {{matterNumber}} against {{client}}'s Outside Counsel Guidelines. Identify all violations, quantify the suggested reduction, and draft a dispute letter if required.
